title: Winter Time
description: Covers the World in a Nice Layer of Snow for Winter Vibes.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below: [![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Winter Time V2
Winter Time turns your world into a Wonderfull Snowy Landscape with colder colours for plants and flowers. This changes crops, flowers, saplins, trees, vines. This pack is great if you are in the wintery feel for things or getting ready to enjoy the winter holidays.
## Changes
- Grass and foliage Colour Maps to a mix of white and blue.
- Leaf Litter Colour Map to be a little bit more white to fit in with the snow.
- Saplings have Snow on them to match Trees.
- Most Flowers have been changed.
- Birch and Spruce Leaves to Fit in Better.
- Makes Water Icy
